## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — required by our DCO check
- [ ] Linter passes (website: `npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (website: `npm test`) and new behavior is covered
- [ ] New files have SPDX headers or are covered by `REUSE.toml` (`reuse lint` is green)
